allow: Bash(curl -s http://localhost:8080/crm/dashboard/todo-summary -H "Authorization: Bearer $\(mysql -u root -p1234 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 mitedtsm_database -N -e "SELECT access_token FROM system_oauth2_access_token WHERE user_id=1 AND expires_time > NOW\(\) ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1" \)")

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:8080/crm/dashboard/todo-summary" -H "Authorization: Bearer $\(mysql -u root -p1234 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 mitedtsm_database -N -e "SELECT access_token FROM system_oauth2_access_token WHERE user_id=1 AND expires_time > NOW\(\) ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1" 2>/dev/null\)")
